hooks.description: Check for hardcoded secrets before writing
Run security audit on bash commands
Validates version bump, CHANGELOG, and build before git push
Enforce PR format and CHANGELOG entry before gh pr create

hooks.prompt:
STOP. Before running gh pr merge, follow squash merge conventions:
1. TITLE: Let GitHub default it — "PR title (#N)" format.
2. BODY: Write a clean, concise summary of the branch's work (2-4 sentences).
   NEVER use the automatic squash description that dumps all individual commit messages.

3. Use --body flag with a HEREDOC to pass the clean description.
Example: gh pr merge N --squash --body "$(cat <<'EOF' Add loaf cleanup CLI command that scans .agents/ directories and recommends cleanup actions. Includes shared prompt helpers, scanner engine, interactive/dry-run modes, and skill update. EOF )"
Rewrite your gh pr merge command now with a clean --body.

ADVISORY: You are about to run `git push`. 
Confirm the following before proceeding: - All tests pass locally - CHANGELOG.md has been updated - Version has been bumped if releasing
Type 'yes' to proceed with the push.

hooks.description: Detect Linear magic words for auto-status updates
Regenerate TASKS.md when task files change

hooks.prompt:
KNOWLEDGE BASE: The file you just edited may have stale knowledge coverage.
Consider updating the corresponding knowledge file if: - The change affects documented patterns or conventions - The file is listed in covers: frontmatter of any knowledge file
Run `loaf kb review` to check coverage status.
hooks.description: Alert when editing files covered by stale knowledge

hooks.prompt:
POST-MERGE HOUSEKEEPING:
1. Delete local branch: git branch -d <branch-name> 2. Update main: git checkout main && git pull 3. Archive session: loaf session archive
Consider running these commands now.
hooks.description: Inject housekeeping checklist after successful gh pr merge
Validate SOUL.md is present; restore from template if missing
Agent-aware session context and active sessions overview
Surface stale knowledge count at session start
Start session journal for current branch
Agent-specific completion checklist and session hygiene reminder
Prompt for knowledge consolidation if stale files were flagged
Identify active sessions and prompt for context-archiver agent to preserve state

hooks.prompt:
CONTEXT COMPACTION IMMINENT: Your conversation context will be compacted soon.
Before compaction, consider flushing important journal entries: - `decide(scope): key decisions made this session` - `discover(scope): important findings` - `conclude(scope): session summary`
Run `loaf session log "type(scope): description"` to capture entries. After compaction, the transcript will be preserved in `.agents/transcripts/`.
hooks.description: Nudge for journal flush before context compaction

hooks.prompt:
SESSION JOURNAL NUDGE: You have made edits or commits this turn but have not recorded any `decide()`, `discover()`, or `conclude()` entries in the session journal.
Consider capturing key decisions before ending: - `decide(scope): rationale for decision made` - `discover(scope): insight or finding` - `conclude(scope): final summary or learning`
Run `loaf session log "decide(scope): description"` to capture decisions. See orchestration skill for session management patterns.
hooks.description: Nudge to journal when edits/commits exist without decision entries
